name: Logistics Agent
description: Autonomous shipping cost and ETA calculator. Given a supplier location, item weight, and destination, returns shipping cost and estimated delivery time.

skills.name: Calculate Shipping
skills.description: Calculates shipping cost and ETA based on supplier location, destination, item count, and item type.
examples: Calculate shipping for 10 cardboard boxes from Chicago to New York
What is the shipping cost for 5 ball bearings from supplier Acme Corp?
